info.title: Books4All
info.description:
**Books4All** is a peer-to-peer used-book marketplace API.

## Features
- 🔐 JWT authentication (email/password + Google & GitHub OAuth)
- 📚 Book listings with search, filters, and pagination
- 🛒 Order management with inventory tracking
- 💳 Stripe payment integration
- ⭐ Verified-purchase book reviews

## Authentication
Most endpoints require a Bearer token obtained from `POST /api/v1/auth/login`.gomma dai

get.description: Returns service health status including DB and Redis connectivity.
Exposes Prometheus-compatible metrics if `prometheus_client` is installed. Returns a basic plain-text stub otherwise.

post.description: Create a new user account and return tokens + user info.
Authenticate with email/password and receive JWT tokens.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new token pair.
Logout the current user. Tokens are stateless JWTs — the client should discard them. Returns 200 OK.

schema.title: Response Logout Api V1 Auth Logout Post

get.description: Return the profile of the currently authenticated user.

post.description: Verify a user's email using the token sent to their inbox.
Send a password reset link to the provided email. Always returns 200 to prevent email enumeration.

schema.title: Response Forgot Password Api V1 Auth Forgot Password Post

post.description: Reset your password using the token from the reset email.

get.description: Return the URL to redirect the user to for Google OAuth login.

post.description: Exchange Google authorization code for user tokens.

get.description: Return the URL to redirect the user to for GitHub OAuth login.

post.description: Exchange GitHub authorization code for user tokens.

Upload a file to storage (MinIO/S3).
Returns the public URL of the uploaded file.

schema.title: Response Upload File Api V1 Upload Post

get.description: Return all distinct categories that have active book listings.

schema.title: Response List Categories Api V1 Books Categories Get

get.description: Return the current seller's own book listings, with optional status filter.
Search active book listings with optional filters. Supports full-text search, category, condition, price range, and pagination.

post.description: Create a new book listing. Only sellers and admins can create listings.

get.description: Retrieve a single book listing by ID, including seller information.

put.description: Update an existing book listing. Only the owning seller or an admin may update a listing.

delete.description: Soft-delete a book listing. Only the owning seller or an admin can delete a listing.

post.description: Change a book's status from DRAFT → ACTIVE, making it visible to buyers. Only the owning seller or an admin can publish.

get.description: List reviews for a book with optional filters. Also includes aggregate stats (average rating, distribution) in the response.

post.description: Leave a review for a book. A verified purchase badge is automatically added if you purchased the book. You can only submit one review per book.

409.description: You have already reviewed this book

put.description: Update your own review's rating and/or comment.

delete.description: Delete your own review. Admins can delete any review.

get.summary: Get review stats for a book
get.description: Return aggregate review statistics: average rating, distribution, and verified count.
Return the current user's order history, paginated. Sellers can also use this to see orders containing their books.

post.description: Place a new order. Stock levels are checked and decremented atomically. After creation, proceed to /payments/checkout/{order_id} to pay.

get.description: Retrieve a single order by ID. Access is restricted to the order owner, relevant sellers, and admins.

post.description: Cancel a pending order. Only orders in PENDING or PAYMENT_PROCESSING status can be cancelled. Stock is restored on cancellation.

422.description: Order cannot be cancelled in its current status

post.description: Create a Stripe Checkout Session for a pending order. Returns a URL to redirect the user to for payment. The order must be in PENDING or PAYMENT_PROCESSING status.

402.description: Payment error or order not payable

post.description: Receive and process Stripe webhook events. Stripe-Signature header is required for payload verification. **Do not call this endpoint directly** — it is for Stripe's use only.

schema.title: Response Stripe Webhook Api V1 Payments Webhook Post

AuthResponse.title: AuthResponse
AuthResponse.description:
Schema for authentication response with user data.

Combines token response with user information.

BookBriefResponse.title: BookBriefResponse
BookBriefResponse.description: Brief book info for nested responses.

BookCreate.title: BookCreate
BookCreate.description:
Schema for creating a new book listing.

Seller ID is set from the authenticated user.

BookResponse.title: BookResponse
BookResponse.description:
Schema for book API response.

Includes all book fields plus seller information.

BookUpdate.title: BookUpdate
BookUpdate.description:
Schema for updating a book listing.

All fields are optional - only provided fields will be updated.

LoginRequest.title: LoginRequest
LoginRequest.description:
Schema for user login.

Attributes:
    email: User's email address
    password: User's password

OAuthURLResponse.title: OAuthURLResponse
OAuthURLResponse.description: Schema for OAuth authorization URL response.

OrderCreate.title: OrderCreate
OrderCreate.description:
Schema for creating a new order.

Buyer ID is set from the authenticated user.

OrderItemCreate.title: OrderItemCreate
OrderItemCreate.description: Schema for creating an order item.

OrderItemResponse.title: OrderItemResponse
OrderItemResponse.description: Schema for order item API response.

PasswordResetRequest.title: PasswordResetRequest
PasswordResetRequest.description: Schema for password reset request (forgot password).

RegisterRequest.title: RegisterRequest
RegisterRequest.description:
Schema for user registration.

Attributes:
    email: User's email address
    password: User's password (min 8 chars, must include upper, lower, digit)
    first_name: Optional first name
    last_name: Optional last name
    role: User role (buyer or seller)

ReviewCreate.title: ReviewCreate
ReviewCreate.description:
Schema for creating a new review.

Book ID is provided in the URL path.
User ID is set from the authenticated user.

ReviewUpdate.title: ReviewUpdate
ReviewUpdate.description:
Schema for updating a review.

All fields are optional - only provided fields will be updated.

TokenResponse.title: TokenResponse
TokenResponse.description:
Schema for authentication token response.

Attributes:
    access_token: JWT access token
    refresh_token: JWT refresh token
    token_type: Token type (always "bearer")
    expires_in: Access token expiry in seconds

UserBriefResponse.title: UserBriefResponse
UserBriefResponse.description: Brief user info for nested responses.

UserResponse.title: UserResponse
UserResponse.description:
Schema for user API response.

Excludes sensitive fields like password_hash.
